title: Sculk World
description: Turn the world into a nightmare infested with sculk everywhere !
body:
"**This World has been infested by Sculk**"

Explore the world of Minecraft in a new unique way, patches of sculk from the deep dark have expanded to every biomes of this world, making exploration way more dangerous, each step is a risk, and wardens are lurking at every corners, will you be brave enough to conquer this world ?

Find out for yourself with this Survival experiment: Sculk World

![sculk world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t0GWQFZM/images/316318ed94cf00c24386a019f87fbab6b3162938.png)


If you have any issue or feedbacks, join the discord ! https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k

And if you want more amazing datapacks, check out https://modrinth.com/user/nugrevan
